# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-06-19

Vercel removed CLI-specific deployment limits, allowing CI/CD pipelines and AI agents to deploy without rate throttling.

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Vercel: CLI deployment limits removed
   Direct removal of a platform constraint that affects CI/CD pipelines and agent-driven deployments.

2. Haystack v2.30.2-rc1: Agent exit condition bug fixed
   Practical bug fix that affects agent reliability in a popular open-source framework.

3. Cloudflare opens Agents SDK to all frameworks, starting with Flue
   Directly relevant to Fuzzy's MCP/agent work; opens a new deployment path for durable agents on Cloudflare.

4. Vercel Ship 2026 recap
   Tracks where the Next.js/Vercel ecosystem is headed; relevant for future deployment decisions.

Full brief with all 40 researched links → https://thenightlylibrarian.com/briefs/2026-06-19
